mapper.select: SELECT no, title, writer, to_char(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS regDate FROM t_board ORDER BY no DESC
SELECT no, title, writer, content, view_cnt AS viewCnt, to_char(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS regDate FROM t_board WHERE no = #{no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_board(no, title, writer, content) VALUES(seq_t_board_no.nextval, #{title}, #{writer}, #{content})
